payload.body: Final runner result: 1104 entries processed, 1062 cities acquired in this run, 6402443 unique lots published to s3://sentropic-geo/normalized/qc-cadastre-lots/ as municipal shards with .meta.json sidecars. Known source-side failures: austin and saint-marc-du-lac-long returned ArcGIS 503. Several remote entries returned zero lots from source.
payload.title: Complete QC cadastre lot shard publication

payload.body: Built and pushed rg.fr-par.scw.cloud/sentropic-geo/geo-api:0.1.4 (digest sha256:251ac826e19540d7c08b5788fe77299af1022819a0011f8b35345918e11689ca), applied Deployment/Service/Ingress, patched live geo NetworkPolicy selector from app.kubernetes.io/name=geo to geo-api, and smoked via Traefik LB 51.159.11.157 with SNI api.geo.sent-tech.ca: /collections returned 1172 collections, 1103 lot collections, 69 zoning collections in about 0.9s.
payload.title: Deploy geo-api 0.1.4 and smoke QC zones/lots

payload.body: Cluster/LB API works with SNI against Traefik LB 51.159.11.157, but public api.geo.sent-tech.ca resolves through Cloudflare 172.64.80.1. HTTP redirects to https://api.geo.sent-tech.ca:8443 and HTTPS handshake fails on 443/8443. Correct DNS/Cloudflare proxy/origin config before closing public-domain validation.
payload.title: Fix public api.geo.sent-tech.ca Cloudflare routing
